_**User (2026-04-03 12:52:17Z)**_

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - User is in Phase 8 (Iterative Buildout) of the Inventorize project, implementing features in batches
   - Batch 1 was completed: barcode/QR scanning on stock-in/stock-out pages, CSV export on reports, dashboard charts + low stock alerts
   - Batch 2 was proposed and confirmed by user: (1) Supplier create/edit form, (2) Stock adjustment form with reason/notes/quantity delta, (3) Audit log filtering by action type, entity, user, and date
   - User prefers Claude Code over Cline for all phases (saved in memory)
   - Working on branch `feat/batch1-scanning-csv-dashboard`

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Inventorize: multi-tenant SaaS inventory management app
   - Next.js 15 App Router with tRPC for API
   - Prisma ORM with tenant-scoped queries via `withTenantContext`
   - Auth.js v5 with JWT strategy, `getToken()` for Edge Runtime middleware
   - html5-qrcode for browser-based barcode/QR scanning
   - recharts for dashboard chart visualizations
   - RBAC via `requireRole()` middleware on tRPC procedures
   - `exactOptionalPropertyTypes: true` in tsconfig — strict optional handling
   - Stock adjustment uses reason enum: `recount | damage | theft | correction | other`
   - Audit log router already supports filter params: entityType, entityId, actorUserId, startDate, endDate
   - App runs on port 3000 via standalone server (not Docker-mapped 44884)
   - All tenant-scoped data uses `tenantId` with RLS enforcement

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`apps/web/src/lib/csv-export.ts`** (NEW — Batch 1)
     - Generic CSV generation utility with proper escaping and browser download trigger
     ```ts
     export function downloadCsv(
       rows: Record<string, string | number | boolean | null | undefined>[],
       columns: { key: string; header: string }[],
       filename: string,
     ): void {
       // escapes commas/quotes/newlines, creates Blob, triggers download link
     }
     ```

   - **`apps/web/src/components/barcode-scanner.tsx`** (Created in prior session, ESLint fix in this session)
     - Camera-based barcode/QR scanning via html5-qrcode + manual text input fallback
     - Props: `onScan: (value: string) => void`, `onError?`, `placeholder?`
     - Uses `Html5Qrcode` with `facingMode: 'environment'` for rear camera
     - ESLint fix: added `// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-enum-comparison` before `state === 2` check

   - **`apps/web/src/app/[tenantSlug]/stock-in/page.tsx`** (Rewritten — Batch 1)
     - Added "New Stock In" form with BarcodeScanner component
     - Product search via `trpc.product.list.useQuery` triggered by scan result
     - PendingItems state management for multi-item receiving
     - Editable quantity and supplier cost per item
     - Calls `trpc.stockIn.create.useMutation` with items array

   - **`apps/web/src/app/[tenantSlug]/stock-out/page.tsx`** (Rewritten — Batch 1)
     - Added "New Stock Out" form with BarcodeScanner, requestedBy, usedFor fields
     - Shows available quantity per product, enforces max via input max attribute
     - Calls `trpc.stockOut.create.useMutation`

   - **`apps/web/src/app/[tenantSlug]/dashboard/page.tsx`** (Rewritten — Batch 1)
     - Added recharts BarChart showing Stock In/Out/Adjustment over last 14 days
     - Aggregates movements by date from `trpc.report.stockMovements`
     - Low stock alert banner from `trpc.report.lowStock` showing top 5 items
     - KPI cards now color-coded (low stock count in red when > 0)

   - **`apps/web/src/app/[tenantSlug]/reports/page.tsx`** (Rewritten — Batch 1)
     - Tab-based layout: "Stock Movements" and "Low Stock"
     - CSV export buttons on both tabs using `downloadCsv()` utility
     - Movements table now shows product name/code and performer name (via includes)
     - Low stock table shows productCode, name, category, current qty vs threshold

   - **`apps/web/src/app/[tenantSlug]/suppliers/page.tsx`** (READ — needs Batch 2 enhancement)
     - Currently: list with search, shows name/contact/phone/email/status
     - Needs: create form and edit functionality

   - **`apps/web/src/app/[tenantSlug]/adjustments/page.tsx`** (READ — needs Batch 2 enhancement)
     - Currently: basic list showing date/reason/createdBy/approvedBy
     - Needs: full adjustment form with product selection, quantity delta, reason enum

   - **`apps/web/src/app/[tenantSlug]/audit-logs/page.tsx`** (READ — needs Batch 2 enhancement)
     - Currently: basic list showing date/action/actor/entity
     - Needs: filter controls for entityType, actorUserId, startDate, endDate

   - **`apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/supplier.router.ts`** (READ for Batch 2)
     - `list`: paginated, searchable by name/contactPerson, requires ADMIN or PURCHASING_STAFF
     - `create`: name (required), contactPerson, phone, email, address, notes (all nullable)
     - `update`: id + all fields optional, plus isActive toggle

   - **`apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/stock-adjustment.router.ts`** (READ for Batch 2)
     - `list`: paginated, ADMIN only, includes createdByUser/approvedByUser/items with product names
     - `create`: adjustmentDate, reason (enum: recount/damage/theft/correction/other), notes, items: [{productId, quantityDelta}]
     - Validates stock won't go negative, applies changes atomically in transaction

   - **`apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/audit-log.router.ts`** (READ for Batch 2)
     - `list`: paginated, ADMIN only, filters: entityType, entityId, actorUserId, startDate, endDate
     - Includes actorUser name and email

   - **`apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/product.router.ts`** (READ)
     - `list` supports search by name, productCode, barcodeValue — used by barcode scanner
     - Returns id, productCode, barcodeValue, name, category, unit, currentQuantity, etc.

   - **`apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/report.router.ts`** (READ)
     - `lowStock`: raw SQL query for products where currentQuantity <= lowStockThreshold
     - `stockMovements`: includes product name/code and performedByUser name
     - `inventorySummary`: totalProducts, activeProducts, lowStockProducts, inventoryValue

   - **`apps/web/src/server/auth/index.ts`** (from prior session)
     - Auth.js v5 Credentials provider with bcrypt, JWT strategy, 8hr sessions
     - `trustHost: true` for dev localhost

4. Errors and Fixes:
   - **ESLint `@typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-enum-comparison`** on barcode-scanner.tsx line 23:
     - Error: `The two values in this comparison do not have a shared enum type` when comparing `scannerRef.current.getState() === 2`
     - Fix: Added `// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-enum-comparison` comment before the comparison
     - Build passed after fix

5. Problem Solving:
   - Batch 1 fully implemented and build-verified: barcode scanning, CSV export, dashboard charts
   - Batch 2 proposed based on cross-referencing PRODUCT.md against IMPLEMENTATION_MAP.md

 `./apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/supplier.router.ts`

```text
1	// Supplier router — tenant-scoped CRUD
2	
3	import { z } from 'zod';
4	import { createTRPCRouter, tenantProcedure } from '../trpc';
5	import { requireRole } from '../middleware/rbac';
6	import { UserRole } from '@inventorize/shared/enums';
7	import { prisma } from '@inventorize/db';
8	import { withTenantContext } from '@inventorize/db';
9	import type { Prisma } from '@inventorize/db';
10	
11	export const supplierRouter = createTRPCRouter({
12	  list: tenantProcedure
13	    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.PURCHASING_STAFF))
14	    .input(
15	      z.object({
16	        page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1),
17	        limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(200).default(50),
18	        search: z.string().optional(),
19	      }).strict(),
20	    )
21	    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
22	      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
23	      const userId = ctx.userId!;
24	      return withTenantContext(
25	        { tenantId, userId },
26	        async () => {
27	          const where = {
28	            tenantId,
29	            ...(input.search !== undefined
30	              ? {
31	                  OR: [
32	                    { name: { contains: input.search, mode: 'insensitive' as const } },
33	                    { contactPerson: { contains: input.search, mode: 'insensitive' as const } },
34	                  ],
35	                }
36	              : {}),
37	          };
38	          const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
39	            prisma.supplier.findMany({
40	              where,
41	              skip: (input.page - 1) * input.limit,
42	              take: input.limit,
43	              orderBy: { name: 'asc' },
44	            }),
45	            prisma.supplier.count({ where }),
46	          ]);
47	          return { items, total, page: input.page, limit: input.limit, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / input.limit) };
48	        },
49	      );
50	    }),
51	
52	  create: tenantProcedure
53	    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.PURCHASING_STAFF))
54	    .input(
55	      z.object({
56	        name: z.string().min(1).max(200),
57	        contactPerson: z.string().max(200).nullable().default(null),
58	        phone: z.string().max(50).nullable().default(null),
59	        email: z.string().email().nullable().default(null),
60	        address: z.string().max(500).nullable().default(null),
61	        notes: z.string().max(2000).nullable().default(null),
62	      }).strict(),
63	    )
64	    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
65	      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
66	      const userId = ctx.userId!;
67	      return withTenantContext(
68	        { tenantId, userId },
69	        async () => {
70	          return prisma.supplier.create({
71	            data: { ...input, tenantId, isActive: true },
72	          });
73	        },
74	      );
75	    }),
76	
77	  update: tenantProcedure
78	    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.PURCHASING_STAFF))
79	    .input(
80	      z.object({
81	        id: z.string().cuid(),
82	        name: z.string().min(1).max(200).optional(),
83	        contactPerson: z.string().max(200).nullable().optional(),
84	        phone: z.string().max(50).nullable().optional(),
85	        email: z.string().email().nullable().optional(),
86	        address: z.string().max(500).nullable().optional(),
87	        notes: z.string().max(2000).nullable().optional(),
88	        isActive: z.boolean().optional(),
89	      }).strict(),
90	    )
91	    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
92	      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
93	      const userId = ctx.userId!;
94	      return withTenantContext(
95	        { tenantId, userId },
96	        async () => {
97	          const { id, ...data } = input;
98	          const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {};
99	          if (data.name !== undefined) updateData['name'] = data.name;
100	          if (data.contactPerson !== undefined) updateData['contactPerson'] = data.contactPerson;
101	          if (data.phone !== undefined) updateData['phone'] = data.phone;
102	          if (data.email !== undefined) updateData['email'] = data.email;
103	          if (data.address !== undefined) updateData['address'] = data.address;
104	          if (data.notes !== undefined) updateData['notes'] = data.notes;
105	          if (data.isActive !== undefined) updateData['isActive'] = data.isActive;
106	          return prisma.supplier.update({
107	            where: { id },
108	            data: updateData as Prisma.SupplierUncheckedUpdateInput,
109	          });
110	        },
111	      );
112	    }),
113	});
114
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/stock-adjustment.router.ts`

```text
1	// Stock adjustment router — tenant-scoped inventory corrections with atomic updates
2	
3	import { z } from 'zod';
4	import { TRPCError } from '@trpc/server';
5	import { createTRPCRouter, tenantProcedure } from '../trpc';
6	import { requireRole } from '../middleware/rbac';
7	import { UserRole } from '@inventorize/shared/enums';
8	import { prisma } from '@inventorize/db';
9	import { withTenantContext } from '@inventorize/db';
10	
11	export const stockAdjustmentRouter = createTRPCRouter({
12	  list: tenantProcedure
13	    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN))
14	    .input(
15	      z.object({
16	        page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1),
17	        limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(200).default(50),
18	      }).strict(),
19	    )
20	    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
21	      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
22	      const userId = ctx.userId!;
23	      return withTenantContext(
24	        { tenantId, userId },
25	        async () => {
26	          const where = { tenantId };
27	          const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
28	            prisma.stockAdjustment.findMany({
29	              where,
30	              skip: (input.page - 1) * input.limit,
31	              take: input.limit,
32	              orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
33	              include: {
34	                createdByUser: { select: { name: true } },
35	                approvedByUser: { select: { name: true } },
36	                items: { include: { product: { select: { name: true } } } },
37	              },
38	            }),
39	            prisma.stockAdjustment.count({ where }),
40	          ]);
41	          return { items, total, page: input.page, limit: input.limit, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / input.limit) };
42	        },
43	      );
44	    }),
45	
46	  create: tenantProcedure
47	    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN))
48	    .input(
49	      z.object({
50	        adjustmentDate: z.string().datetime(),
51	        reason: z.enum(['recount', 'damage', 'theft', 'correction', 'other']),
52	        notes: z.string().max(2000).nullable().default(null),
53	        items: z.array(
54	          z.object({
55	            productId: z.string().cuid(),
56	            quantityDelta: z.number().int(),
57	          }).strict(),
58	        ).min(1),
59	      }).strict(),
60	    )
61	    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
62	      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
63	      const userId = ctx.userId!;
64	      return withTenantContext(
65	        { tenantId, userId },
66	        async () => {
67	          return prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
68	            // Validate all products exist and stock won't go negative
69	            for (const item of input.items) {
70	              const product = await tx.product.findFirstOrThrow({
71	                where: { id: item.productId, tenantId },
72	              });
73	              if (product.currentQuantity + item.quantityDelta < 0) {
74	                throw new TRPCError({
75	                  code: 'BAD_REQUEST',
76	                  message: `Adjustment would result in negative stock for ${product.name}.`,
77	                });
78	              }
79	            }
80	
81	            const adjustment = await tx.stockAdjustment.create({
82	              data: {
83	                tenantId,
84	                adjustmentDate: new Date(input.adjustmentDate),
85	                reason: input.reason,
86	                notes: input.notes,
87	                createdByUserId: userId,
88	                items: { create: input.items.map((item) => ({ ...item, tenantId })) },
89	              },
90	            });
91	
92	            // Fetch items separately — $extends client loses include types in transactions
93	            const adjustmentItems = await tx.stockAdjustmentItem.findMany({
94	              where: { stockAdjustmentId: adjustment.id },
95	            });
96	
97	            // Apply quantity changes and create movement logs
98	            for (const item of adjustmentItems) {
99	              const product = await tx.product.findFirstOrThrow({
100	                where: { id: item.productId, tenantId },
101	              });
102	
103	              if (item.quantityDelta > 0) {
104	                await tx.product.update({
105	                  where: { id: item.productId },
106	                  data: { currentQuantity: { increment: item.quantityDelta } },
107	                });
108	              } else {
109	                await tx.product.update({
110	                  where: { id: item.productId },
111	                  data: { currentQuantity: { decrement: Math.abs(item.quantityDelta) } },
112	                });
113	              }
114	
115	              await tx.stockMovementLog.create({
116	                data: {
117	                  tenantId,
118	                  productId: item.productId,
119	                  movementType: 'adjustment',
120	                  referenceType: 'StockAdjustment',
121	                  referenceId: adjustment.id,
122	                  quantityBefore: product.currentQuantity,
123	                  quantityDelta: item.quantityDelta,
124	                  quantityAfter: product.currentQuantity + item.quantityDelta,
125	                  performedByUserId: userId,
126	                  notes: `${input.reason}: ${input.notes ?? 'No notes'}`,
127	                  performedAt: new Date(),
128	                },
129	              });
130	            }
131	
132	            return adjustment;
133	          });
134	        },
135	      );
136	    }),
137	});
138
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/audit-log.router.ts`

```text
1	// Audit log router — tenant-scoped immutable audit trail (read-only)
2	
3	import { z } from 'zod';
4	import { createTRPCRouter, tenantProcedure } from '../trpc';
5	import { requireRole } from '../middleware/rbac';
6	import { UserRole } from '@inventorize/shared/enums';
7	import { prisma } from '@inventorize/db';
8	import { withTenantContext } from '@inventorize/db';
9	
10	export const auditLogRouter = createTRPCRouter({
11	  list: tenantProcedure
12	    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN))
13	    .input(
14	      z.object({
15	        page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1),
16	        limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(200).default(50),
17	        entityType: z.string().optional(),
18	        entityId: z.string().optional(),
19	        actorUserId: z.string().cuid().optional(),
20	        startDate: z.string().datetime().optional(),
21	        endDate: z.string().datetime().optional(),
22	      }).strict(),
23	    )
24	    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
25	      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
26	      const userId = ctx.userId!;
27	      return withTenantContext(
28	        { tenantId, userId },
29	        async () => {
30	          const where = {
31	            tenantId,
32	            ...(input.entityType !== undefined ? { entityType: input.entityType } : {}),
33	            ...(input.entityId !== undefined ? { entityId: input.entityId } : {}),
34	            ...(input.actorUserId !== undefined ? { actorUserId: input.actorUserId } : {}),
35	            ...(input.startDate !== undefined || input.endDate !== undefined
36	              ? {
37	                  createdAt: {
38	                    ...(input.startDate !== undefined ? { gte: new Date(input.startDate) } : {}),
39	                    ...(input.endDate !== undefined ? { lte: new Date(input.endDate) } : {}),
40	                  },
41	                }
42	              : {}),
43	          };
44	          const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
45	            prisma.auditLog.findMany({
46	              where,
47	              skip: (input.page - 1) * input.limit,
48	              take: input.limit,
49	              orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
50	              include: {
51	                actorUser: { select: { name: true, email: true } },
52	              },
53	            }),
54	            prisma.auditLog.count({ where }),
55	          ]);
56	          return { items, total, page: input.page, limit: input.limit, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / input.limit) };
57	        },
58	      );
59	    }),
60	});
61
```
</details></tool-use>

1	// Suppliers list page
2	
3	'use client';
4	
5	import { useState } from 'react';
6	import { trpc } from '@/lib/trpc';
7	
8	export default function SuppliersPage() {
9	  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
10	  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
11	
12	  const { data, isLoading } = trpc.supplier.list.useQuery({
13	    page,
14	    limit: 50,
15	    search: search.length > 0 ? search : undefined,
16	  });
17	
18	  return (
19	    <div className="space-y-6">
20	      <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Suppliers</h1>
21	
22	      <input
23	        type="text"
24	        placeholder="Search suppliers..."
25	        value={search}
26	        onChange={(e) => { setSearch(e.target.value); setPage(1); }}
27	        className="flex h-10 w-full max-w-sm rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring"
28	      />
29	
30	      {isLoading ? (
31	        <div>Loading suppliers...</div>
32	      ) : (
33	        <div className="rounded-lg border border-border">
34	          <table className="w-full text-sm">
35	            <thead>
36	              <tr className="border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
37	                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Name</th>
38	                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Contact</th>
39	                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Phone</th>
40	                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Email</th>
41	                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Status</th>
42	              </tr>
43	            </thead>
44	            <tbody>
45	              {data?.items.map((supplier) => (
46	                <tr key={supplier.id} className="border-b border-border">
47	                  <td className="px-4 py-3 font-medium">{supplier.name}</td>
48	                  <td className="px-4 py-3">{supplier.contactPerson ?? '-'}</td>
49	                  <td className="px-4 py-3">{supplier.phone ?? '-'}</td>
50	                  <td className="px-4 py-3">{supplier.email ?? '-'}</td>
51	                  <td className="px-4 py-3">
52	                    <span className={`inline-block rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${
53	                      supplier.isActive ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800'
54	                    }`}>

56	                    </span>

```tsx
// Suppliers list page with create form and inline edit

'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { trpc } from '@/lib/trpc';

interface SupplierFormData {
  name: string;
  contactPerson: string;
  phone: string;
  email: string;
  address: string;
  notes: string;
}

const emptyForm: SupplierFormData = {
  name: '',
  contactPerson: '',
  phone: '',
  email: '',
  address: '',
  notes: '',
};

export default function SuppliersPage() {
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false);
  const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [form, setForm] = useState<SupplierFormData>(emptyForm);

  const { data, isLoading, refetch } = trpc.supplier.list.useQuery({
    page,
    limit: 50,
    search: search.length > 0 ? search : undefined,
  });

  const createMutation = trpc.supplier.create.useMutation({
    onSuccess: () => {
      setForm(emptyForm);
      setShowForm(false);
      void refetch();
    },
  });

  const updateMutation = trpc.supplier.update.useMutation({
    onSuccess: () => {
      setForm(emptyForm);
      setEditingId(null);
      setShowForm(false);
      void refetch();
    },
  });

  const startEdit = (supplier: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    contactPerson: string | null;
    phone: string | null;
    email: string | null;
    address: string | null;
    notes: string | null;
  }) => {
    setEditingId(supplier.id);
    setForm({
      name: supplier.name,
      contactPerson: supplier.contactPerson ?? '',
      phone: supplier.phone ?? '',
      email: supplier.email ?? '',
      address: supplier.address ?? '',
      notes: supplier.notes ?? '',
    });
    setShowForm(true);
  };

  const handleSubmit = () => {
    if (form.name.trim().length === 0) return;

    const payload = {
      name: form.name.trim(),
      contactPerson: form.contactPerson.trim().length > 0 ? form.contactPerson.trim() : null,
      phone: form.phone.trim().length > 0 ? form.phone.trim() : null,
      email: form.email.trim().length > 0 ? form.email.trim() : null,
      address: form.address.trim().length > 0 ? form.address.trim() : null,
      notes: form.notes.trim().length > 0 ? form.notes.trim() : null,
    };

    if (editingId !== null) {
      updateMutation.mutate({ id: editingId, ...payload });
    } else {
      createMutation.mutate(payload);
    }
  };

  const toggleActive = (id: string, currentlyActive: boolean) => {
    updateMutation.mutate({ id, isActive: !currentlyActive });
  };

  const cancelForm = () => {
    setForm(emptyForm);
    setEditingId(null);
    setShowForm(false);
  };

  const isPending = createMutation.isPending || updateMutation.isPending;
  const isError = createMutation.isError || updateMutation.isError;
  const errorMessage = createMutation.error?.message ?? updateMutation.error?.message ?? '';

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Suppliers</h1>
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={() => {
            if (showForm) {
              cancelForm();
            } else {
              setShowForm(true);
            }
          }}
          className="rounded-md bg-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-primary-foreground"
        >
          {showForm ? 'Cancel' : '+ New Supplier'}
        </button>
      </div>

      {showForm && (
        <div className="space-y-4 rounded-lg border border-border p-4">
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">
            {editingId !== null ? 'Edit Supplier' : 'Add Supplier'}
          </h2>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2">
            <div>
              <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium">Name *</label>
              <input
                type="text"
                value={form.name}
                onChange={(e) => { setForm({ ...form, name: e.target.value }); }}
                placeholder="Supplier name"
                className="w-full rounded-md border border-border bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm"
              />
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium">Contact Person</label>
              <input
                type="text"
                value={form.contactPerson}
                onChange={(e) => { setForm({ ...form, contactPerson: e.target.value }); }}
                placeholder="Contact person name"
                className="w-full rounded-md border border-border bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm"
              />
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium">Phone</label>
              <input
                type="text"
                value={form.phone}
                onChange={(e) => { setForm({ ...form, phone: e.target.value }); }}
                placeholder="Phone number"
                className="w-full rounded-md border border-border bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm"
              />
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium">Email</label>
              <input
                type="email"
                value={form.email}
                onChange={(e) => { setForm({ ...form, email: e.target.value }); }}
                placeholder="email@example.com"
                className="w-full rounded-md border border-border bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm"
              />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div>
            <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium">Address</label>
            <input
              type="text"
              value={form.address}
              onChange={(e) => { setForm({ ...form, address: e.target.value }); }}
              placeholder="Full address"
              className="w-full rounded-md border border-border bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm"
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium">Notes</label>
            <textarea
              value={form.notes}
              onChange={(e) => { setForm({ ...form, notes: e.target.value }); }}
              placeholder="Additional notes (optional)"
              className="w-full rounded-md border border-border bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm"
              rows={2}
            />
          </div>

          <div className="flex gap-2">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={handleSubmit}
              disabled={form.name.trim().length === 0 || isPending}
              className="rounded-md bg-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-primary-foreground disabled:opacity-50"
            >
              {isPending
                ? 'Saving...'
                : editingId !== null
                  ? 'Update Supplier'
                  : 'Add Supplier'}
            </button>
            {editingId !== null && (
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={cancelForm}
                className="rounded-md border border-border px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium"
              >
                Cancel Edit
              </button>
            )}
          </div>

          {isError && (
            <p className="text-sm text-red-600">{errorMessage}</p>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      <input
        type="text"
        placeholder="Search suppliers..."
        value={search}
        onChange={(e) => { setSearch(e.target.value); setPage(1); }}
        className="flex h-10 w-full max-w-sm rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring"
      />

      {isLoading ? (
        <div>Loading suppliers...</div>
      ) : (
        <div className="rounded-lg border border-border">
          <table className="w-full text-sm">
            <thead>
              <tr className="border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Name</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Contact</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Phone</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Email</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Status</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-right font-medium">Actions</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {data?.items.map((supplier) => (
                <tr key={supplier.id} className="border-b border-border">
                  <td className="px-4 py-3 font-medium">{supplier.name}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3">{supplier.contactPerson ?? '-'}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3">{supplier.phone ?? '-'}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3">{supplier.email ?? '-'}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3">
                    <span className={`inline-block rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${
                      supplier.isActive ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800'
                    }`}>
                      {supplier.isActive ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}
                    </span>
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => { startEdit(supplier); }}
                      className="mr-2 text-sm text-blue-600 hover:underline"
                    >
                      Edit
                    </button>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => { toggleActive(supplier.id, supplier.isActive); }}
                      className="text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:underline"
                    >
                      {supplier.isActive ? 'Deactivate' : 'Activate'}
                    </button>
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ))}
              {data?.items.length === 0 && (
                <tr>
                  <td colSpan={6} className="px-4 py-8 text-center text-muted-foreground">
                    No suppliers found
                  </td>
                </tr>
              )}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
// Stock adjustments page with create form and product search via barcode scanner

'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { trpc } from '@/lib/trpc';
import { BarcodeScanner } from '@/components/barcode-scanner';

const REASONS = [
  { value: 'recount', label: 'Recount' },
  { value: 'damage', label: 'Damage' },
  { value: 'theft', label: 'Theft' },
  { value: 'correction', label: 'Correction' },
  { value: 'other', label: 'Other' },
] as const;

interface PendingItem {
  productId: string;
  productName: string;
  quantityDelta: number;
  currentQuantity: number;
}

export default function AdjustmentsPage() {
  const [page] = useState(1);
  const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false);
  const [reason, setReason] = useState<'recount' | 'damage' | 'theft' | 'correction' | 'other'>('recount');
  const [notes, setNotes] = useState('');
  const [pendingItems, setPendingItems] = useState<PendingItem[]>([]);
  const [scanResult, setScanResult] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const { data, isLoading, refetch } = trpc.stockAdjustment.list.useQuery({ page, limit: 50 });
  const productSearch = trpc.product.list.useQuery(
    { page: 1, limit: 5, search: scanResult ?? '' },
    { enabled: scanResult !== null && scanResult.length > 0 },
  );

  const createMutation = trpc.stockAdjustment.create.useMutation({
    onSuccess: () => {
      setPendingItems([]);
      setReason('recount');
      setNotes('');
      setShowForm(false);
      setScanResult(null);
      void refetch();
    },
  });

  const addItem = (product: { id: string; name: string; currentQuantity: number }) => {
    setPendingItems((prev) => [
      ...prev,
      {
        productId: product.id,
        productName: product.name,
        quantityDelta: 0,
        currentQuantity: product.currentQuantity,
      },
    ]);
    setScanResult(null);
  };

  const removeItem = (index: number) => {
    setPendingItems((prev) => prev.filter((_, i) => i !== index));
  };

  const handleSubmit = () => {
    const validItems = pendingItems.filter((item) => item.quantityDelta !== 0);
    if (validItems.length === 0) return;

    createMutation.mutate({
      adjustmentDate: new Date().toISOString(),
      reason,
      notes: notes.trim().length > 0 ? notes.trim() : null,
      items: validItems.map(({ productId, quantityDelta }) => ({
        productId,
        quantityDelta,
      })),
    });
  };

  const validItemCount = pendingItems.filter((item) => item.quantityDelta !== 0).length;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Stock Adjustments</h1>
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={() => { setShowForm(!showForm); }}
          className="rounded-md bg-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-primary-foreground"
        >
          {showForm ? 'Cancel' : '+ New Adjustment'}
        </button>
      </div>

      {showForm && (
        <div className="space-y-4 rounded-lg border border-border p-4">
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Create Adjustment</h2>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2">
            <div>
              <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium">Reason *</label>
              <select
                value={reason}
                onChange={(e) => { setReason(e.target.value as typeof reason); }}
                className="w-full rounded-md border border-border bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm"
              >
                {REASONS.map((r) => (
                  <option key={r.value} value={r.value}>{r.label}</option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>

          <BarcodeScanner
            onScan={(value) => { setScanResult(value); }}
            placeholder="Scan barcode or type product code..."
          />

          {scanResult !== null && scanResult.length > 0 && (
            <div className="rounded-md border border-border p-3">
              <p className="mb-2 text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">
                Search results for &ldquo;{scanResult}&rdquo;:
              </p>
              {productSearch.isLoading ? (
                <p className="text-sm">Searching...</p>
              ) : productSearch.data?.items.length === 0 ? (
                <p className="text-sm text-red-600">No products found</p>
              ) : (
                <div className="space-y-1">
                  {productSearch.data?.items.map((p) => (
                    <button
                      key={p.id}
                      type="button"
                      onClick={() => { addItem({ id: p.id, name: p.name, currentQuantity: p.currentQuantity }); }}
                      className="flex w-full items-center justify-between rounded px-3 py-2 text-left text-sm hover:bg-muted"
                    >
                      <span>
                        <span className="font-medium">{p.name}</span>
                        <span className="ml-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground">{p.productCode}</span>
                      </span>
                      <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Qty: {p.currentQuantity}</span>
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}

          {pendingItems.length > 0 && (
            <div className="rounded-md border border-border">
              <table className="w-full text-sm">
                <thead>
                  <tr className="border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
                    <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left font-medium">Product</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-2 text-right font-medium">Current Qty</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-2 text-right font-medium">Delta (+/-)</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-2 text-right font-medium">Result</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-2 text-right font-medium"></th>
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                  {pendingItems.map((item, i) => {
                    const resultQty = item.currentQuantity + item.quantityDelta;
                    const isInvalid = resultQty < 0;
                    return (
                      <tr key={`${item.productId}-${i}`} className="border-b border-border">
                        <td className="px-4 py-2">{item.productName}</td>
                        <td className="px-4 py-2 text-right text-muted-foreground">{item.currentQuantity}</td>
                        <td className="px-4 py-2 text-right">
                          <input
                            type="number"
                            value={item.quantityDelta}
                            onChange={(e) => {
                              const delta = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
                              if (!isNaN(delta)) {
                                setPendingItems((prev) =>
                                  prev.map((it, idx) => (idx === i ? { ...it, quantityDelta: delta } : it)),
                                );
                              }
                            }}
                            className="w-24 rounded border border-border bg-background px-2 py-1 text-right text-sm"
                          />
                        </td>
                        <td className={`px-4 py-2 text-right font-medium ${isInvalid ? 'text-red-600' : ''}`}>
                          {resultQty}
                          {isInvalid && <span className="ml-1 text-xs">(negative!)</span>}
                        </td>
                        <td className="px-4 py-2 text-right">
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => { removeItem(i); }}
                            className="text-sm text-red-600 hover:underline"
                          >
                            Remove
                          </button>
                        </td>
                      </tr>
                    );
                  })}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          )}

          <textarea
            value={notes}
            onChange={(e) => { setNotes(e.target.value); }}
            placeholder="Notes (optional)"
            className="w-full rounded-md border border-border bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm"
            rows={2}
          />

          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={handleSubmit}
            disabled={validItemCount === 0 || createMutation.isPending}
            className="rounded-md bg-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-primary-foreground disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            {createMutation.isPending ? 'Saving...' : `Submit Adjustment (${validItemCount} item(s))`}
          </button>

          {createMutation.isError && (
            <p className="text-sm text-red-600">{createMutation.error.message}</p>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {isLoading ? (
        <div>Loading adjustments...</div>
      ) : (
        <div className="rounded-lg border border-border">
          <table className="w-full text-sm">
            <thead>
              <tr className="border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Date</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Reason</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Items</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Created By</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Approved By</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {data?.items.map((adj) => (
                <tr key={adj.id} className="border-b border-border">
                  <td className="px-4 py-3 text-xs">{new Date(adj.adjustmentDate).toLocaleDateString()}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3">
                    <span className={`inline-block rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${
                      adj.reason === 'damage' || adj.reason === 'theft'
                        ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'
                        : adj.reason === 'recount'
                          ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800'
                          : 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'
                    }`}>
                      {adj.reason}
                    </span>
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3 text-xs">
                    {adj.items.map((item) => (
                      <div key={item.id}>
                        {item.product?.name ?? item.productId}: {item.quantityDelta > 0 ? '+' : ''}{item.quantityDelta}
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3">{adj.createdByUser?.name ?? adj.createdByUserId}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3">{adj.approvedByUser?.name ?? (adj.approvedByUserId !== null ? adj.approvedByUserId : 'Pending')}</td>
                </tr>
              ))}
              {data?.items.length === 0 && (
                <tr>
                  <td colSpan={5} className="px-4 py-8 text-center text-muted-foreground">
                    No stock adjustments yet
                  </td>
                </tr>
              )}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
// Tenant audit logs page with filtering by entity type, date range

'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { trpc } from '@/lib/trpc';

const ENTITY_TYPES = [
  '',
  'Product',
  'Supplier',
  'StockIn',
  'StockOut',
  'StockAdjustment',
  'User',
  'Tenant',
] as const;

export default function AuditLogsPage() {
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const [entityType, setEntityType] = useState('');
  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState('');
  const [endDate, setEndDate] = useState('');

  const { data, isLoading } = trpc.auditLog.list.useQuery({
    page,
    limit: 50,
    entityType: entityType.length > 0 ? entityType : undefined,
    startDate: startDate.length > 0 ? new Date(startDate).toISOString() : undefined,
    endDate: endDate.length > 0 ? new Date(endDate + 'T23:59:59').toISOString() : undefined,
  });

  const clearFilters = () => {
    setEntityType('');
    setStartDate('');
    setEndDate('');
    setPage(1);
  };

  const hasFilters = entityType.length > 0 || startDate.length > 0 || endDate.length > 0;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Audit Logs</h1>

      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-end gap-3 rounded-lg border border-border p-4">
        <div>
          <label className="mb-1 block text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Entity Type</label>
          <select
            value={entityType}
            onChange={(e) => { setEntityType(e.target.value); setPage(1); }}
            className="rounded-md border border-border bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm"
          >
            <option value="">All</option>
            {ENTITY_TYPES.filter((t) => t.length > 0).map((t) => (
              <option key={t} value={t}>{t}</option>
            ))}
          </select>
        </div>
        <div>
          <label className="mb-1 block text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Start Date</label>
          <input
            type="date"
            value={startDate}
            onChange={(e) => { setStartDate(e.target.value); setPage(1); }}
            className="rounded-md border border-border bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm"
          />
        </div>
        <div>
          <label className="mb-1 block text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">End Date</label>
          <input
            type="date"
            value={endDate}
            onChange={(e) => { setEndDate(e.target.value); setPage(1); }}
            className="rounded-md border border-border bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm"
          />
        </div>
        {hasFilters && (
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={clearFilters}
            className="rounded-md border border-border px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-muted"
          >
            Clear
          </button>
        )}
      </div>

      {isLoading ? (
        <div>Loading audit logs...</div>
      ) : (
        <>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              {data?.total ?? 0} entries{hasFilters ? ' (filtered)' : ''}
            </p>
            {(data?.totalPages ?? 0) > 1 && (
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => { setPage((p) => Math.max(1, p - 1)); }}
                  disabled={page <= 1}
                  className="rounded-md border border-border px-3 py-1 text-sm disabled:opacity-50"
                >
                  Prev
                </button>
                <span className="px-2 py-1 text-sm">
                  Page {page} of {data?.totalPages ?? 1}
                </span>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => { setPage((p) => p + 1); }}
                  disabled={page >= (data?.totalPages ?? 1)}
                  className="rounded-md border border-border px-3 py-1 text-sm disabled:opacity-50"
                >
                  Next
                </button>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <div className="rounded-lg border border-border">
            <table className="w-full text-sm">
              <thead>
                <tr className="border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
                  <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Date</th>
                  <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Action</th>
                  <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Actor</th>
                  <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Entity</th>
                  <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Entity ID</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {data?.items.map((log) => (
                  <tr key={log.id} className="border-b border-border">
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-xs">{new Date(log.createdAt).toLocaleString()}</td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3">
                      <span className={`inline-block rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${
                        log.actionType === 'CREATE' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' :
                        log.actionType === 'UPDATE' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800' :
                        log.actionType === 'DELETE' ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-800' :
                        'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800'
                      }`}>
                        {log.actionType}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3">
                      <span className="font-medium">{log.actorUser?.name ?? 'System'}</span>
                      {log.actorUser?.email !== undefined && log.actorUser?.email !== null && (
                        <span className="ml-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">{log.actorUser.email}</span>
                      )}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs">{log.entityType}</td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-muted-foreground">{log.entityId}</td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
                {data?.items.length === 0 && (
                  <tr>
                    <td colSpan={5} className="px-4 py-8 text-center text-muted-foreground">
                      {hasFilters ? 'No audit logs match the filters' : 'No audit logs yet'}
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                )}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-03 12:55:02Z)**_

Build passes cleanly. All three Batch 2 features are implemented:

1. **Suppliers page** — Create form (name, contact, phone, email, address, notes), edit button that pre-fills the form, activate/deactivate toggle, search still works
2. **Adjustments page** — Create form with reason dropdown (recount/damage/theft/correction/other), barcode scanner for product search, quantity delta per item with real-time result preview (flags negative stock), notes field, reason-colored badges in the list, shows item details per adjustment
3. **Audit logs page** — Filter bar with entity type dropdown, start/end date pickers, clear button, entry count display, pagination controls, action-type colored badges (CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE), split entity type and entity ID into separate columns

All three pages follow the same patterns as Batch 1 (stock-in/stock-out). Ready for Batch 3 when you are — the remaining unbuilt features from PRODUCT.md include: purchase order workflow, product detail/edit form, user management CRUD, categories management, low stock threshold configuration, product history page, and settings page.
